info.name: Soleil Hostel API v2
info.description:
Complete API collection for Soleil Hostel Management System v2.0.

Features:
- Dual Auth Modes (Bearer Token + HttpOnly Cookie)
- Unified Auth Endpoints (auto-detect mode)
- RBAC (USER, MODERATOR, ADMIN)
- Optimistic Locking for Room Updates
- Pessimistic Locking for Booking Creation
- Email Verification Required for Bookings
- Kubernetes-style Health Probes

Setup:
1. Import this collection
2. Set environment variable `base_url` to `http://localhost:8000/api`
3. Run 'Register' or 'Login (Bearer)' — token auto-saved

exec: // Cookie is set by the server

response.name: Success (200) + Cookie
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login thành công. Token đã được set trong httpOnly cookie.",
  "user": { "id": 1, "name": "Admin", "email": "admin@soleilhostel.com" },
  "expires_in_minutes": 60,
  "token_type": "short_lived"
}

item.name: 📧 Email Verification
item.description: Email verification flow (required before creating bookings).

item.name: 🏨 Rooms
item.description: Room listing, detail, and management. Writes require ADMIN role + lock_version.

exec: console.log('Version conflict! Run Get Room Detail first.');

response.name: Version Conflict (409)

item.name: 📅 Bookings
item.description: Booking CRUD. Requires authenticated + verified email.

response.name: Room Not Available (422)

item.name: 🔧 Admin Bookings
item.description: Admin-only: soft-delete recovery, force delete (GDPR), bulk restore.

item.name: 💚 Health Checks
item.description: Kubernetes-style health probes and system diagnostics.

item.name: 🔄 E2E: Full Booking Flow
item.description: End-to-end test: Register → Login → List Rooms → Create Booking → Confirm → Cancel
